editionData.title: Daily Brief for May 29, 2026: A condemnation of Putin in glitzy Cannes is not enough for beleaguered Ukrainians; Lebanon ceasefire falters as Trump...
editionData.description: Global headlines: A condemnation of Putin in glitzy Cannes is not enough for beleaguered Ukrainians (Andrei Zvyagintsev urged Russian President Vladimir Putin to end the “bloodbath” — but in Ukraine his remarks elicited ridicule and frustration); Lebanon ceasefire falters as Trump pushes for Iran deal (Israel is “deepening its operation” in Lebanon, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said); and False Ebola claims run wild as Congo outbreak worsens (Distrust and violence flare in the Democratic Republic of Congo as false claims spread that the outbreak — and the disease itself — is a hoax). Markets leaned higher, with 4 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 1.86% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Claude Opus 4.8 (Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and...); Bricks and Minifigs Stole a Man's $200k Lego Collection (Track, organize, and value your entire LEGO® collection for free. Browse 20,000+ sets, check prices for retired sets, manage wishlists,...); and Cars are trying to spy on you, and it's only just the beginning (From your weight and facial expressions to your destination, cars collect a startling amount of data about you. Some of it may even raise...). Product Hunt features Sublern (Translate any word in video subtitles with one hover), Growati (The autopilot for YouTube post-production), and Marked 3 (Preview and Publish your Markdown).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: A condemnation of Putin in glitzy Cannes is not enough for beleaguered Ukrainians
headlines.summary: Andrei Zvyagintsev urged Russian President Vladimir Putin to end the “bloodbath” — but in Ukraine his remarks elicited ridicule and frustration.

headlines.title: Lebanon ceasefire falters as Trump pushes for Iran deal
headlines.summary: Israel is “deepening its operation” in Lebanon, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said.

headlines.title: False Ebola claims run wild as Congo outbreak worsens
headlines.summary: Distrust and violence flare in the Democratic Republic of Congo as false claims spread that the outbreak — and the disease itself — is a hoax.

headlines.title: To repair ties with India, Rubio leans into pageantry
headlines.summary: The top U.S. diplomat visited the world’s largest democracy in a bid to reverse soured relations over Trump’s tariff agenda and embrace of Pakistan.

headlines.title: Iran threatens retaliation after U.S. strikes in southern Iran
headlines.summary: The attacks prompted Tehran to warn that it would “leave no act of hostility unanswered,” complicating negotiations to end the war.

headlines.title: US Treasury secretary confirms plans for banknote featuring Trump’s face
headlines.summary: Proposed $250 bill would mark the first time a living person has appeared on US currency in more than a century.

headlines.title: US to designate two Brazilian gangs as ‘terrorist’ organisations
headlines.summary: Trump administration has used crime and drug trafficking to push for greater US military influence across Latin America.

headlines.title: Tehran, Trump yet to comment on plan for 60-day US, Iran truce extension
headlines.summary: Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam says 'nothing can justify' Israel's military onslaught against 'peaceful people' in Lebanon.

headlines.title: Guatemala denies agreeing to US strikes against drug traffickers
headlines.summary: President Bernardo Arevalo's government says it requested security cooperation but did not approve US attacks.

headlines.title: US judge rejects immediate block on Trump’s mail-in voting executive order
headlines.summary: Judge Carl Nichols says Democrats’ legal challenge is premature as the administration moves to implement the measure.

headlines.title: Treasury Department prepares $250 bill with Trump's face on it
headlines.summary: Congress needs to pass legislation in order for the bill's printing

headlines.title: Former senior CIA officer took home gold bars and millions in cash, FBI says
headlines.summary: David Rush, a former senior CIA officer, is accused of theft and making false statements. The trove of gold and cash went missing from his CIA storage space — but it was found in his Virginia home.

headlines.title: FIFA's World Cup ticket sales outraged fans. Now they are under investigation
headlines.summary: FIFA has always had a peculiar way to sell tickets to the World Cup. It never faced any major issues — until prices soared for the 2026 tournament.

headlines.title: Australian woman charged over travel to Syria to join Islamic State
headlines.summary: The arrest came eight months after she returned to Australia with her children from Lebanon.

headlines.title: Orthodox Jewish women in Israel may now take a rabbinic exam, like men
headlines.summary: Until now, only Orthodox Jewish men in Israel have been allowed to take exams to become rabbis. After a long campaign, women can now also take the test - but still can't become rabbis

headlines.title: One German mayor's enduring love for Huangshan
headlines.summary: On what was China Daily reporter Xia Ji's first time in Huangshan, Anhui, she met a German mayor visiting the city for his fourth time. Alexander Badrow's connection to Huangshan dates back to 2015, when Huangshan and the Baltic Sea port of Stralsund became sister cities. Over the past decade, Badrow has collaborated with partners in Huangshan to preserve ancient architecture, safeguard cultural heritage and foster an enduring friendship. Click for more about why this German mayor remains deeply committed to Huangshan.

headlines.title: India swelters under severe hot weather
headlines.summary: An excruciating pre-monsoon heat wave is baking large parts of India, with temperatures routinely breaching 45 C and topping 47 C in many states, causing human and economic distress and even some deaths due to heatstroke.

headlines.title: Steel tariffs open 'can of worms', drive up prices
headlines.summary: The humble tin can is the latest victim of US steel tariffs as domestic manufacturers say producing cans at home has become more expensive than importing them, despite Washington's push to bolster steel production and limit imports.

headlines.title: France extends nuclear umbrella to Norway
headlines.summary: Norway will begin talks on joining a France-led nuclear deterrence program, the countries' leaders announced, a move that, if concluded, would be a notable shift for a traditionally Atlanticist nation long aligned with the United States on security.

headlines.title: China-US cooperation stressed after summit
headlines.summary: Leading scholars from China and the United States are stressing the importance of seizing the opportunity to improve bilateral ties ushered in by the summit between the two countries earlier this month.

headlines.title: Panel on ‘artificial’ demographic changes may consider need for law to tackle issue: Amit Shah
headlines.summary: Amit Shah announces a committee to address illegal immigration and potential laws while promoting voluntary departure of migrants in West Bengal.

headlines.title: Indian Air Force likely to oversee transport of NEET-UG papers
headlines.summary: The Indian Air Force is set to oversee the logistics of the NEET-UG 2026 re-test, following the cancellation of original exam due to a question paper leak.

headlines.title: No ‘double standards’ in fight against terrorism, says NSA Ajit Doval in Russia
headlines.summary: National Security Adviser Ajit Doval emphasises that no double standards in combating terrorism at an 14th international security forum in Moscow, Russia.

headlines.title: Twisha death case: Retired judge Giribala Singh arrested by CBI
headlines.summary: CBI arrests former judge Giribala Singh in Twisha Sharma death case after High Court quashes her anticipatory bail.

headlines.title: No legal action if infiltrators go back on their own: Amit Shah
headlines.summary: Union Home Minister Amit Shah announces no legal action for the voluntary return of infiltrators as government commits to identifying and deporting them.

headlines.title: US to designate two Brazilian gangs as 'terrorist organizations,' Rubio says
headlines.summary: The United States plans to designate Brazil's two biggest criminal gangs as terrorist organizations, U.S. ​Secretary of State Marco Rubio said, opening the door for more aggressive interventions ‌after appeals from the opposition in Brasilia.

headlines.title: Russia brushes off US call not to launch 'systemic strikes' on Kyiv
headlines.summary: The United States leveled unusually harsh criticism against Russia and called for it to refrain from its promised strikes against Kyiv.

headlines.title: US military denies claim US aircraft downed near Iran's Bushehr
headlines.summary: Reuters: US military denies claim US aircraft downed near Iran's Bushehr.

headlines.title: Romania says Russian drone hit block of flats in Galati area
headlines.summary: A ​Russian drone ‌entered Romanian airspace ​and ​crashed onto the ⁠roof of ​a ​block of flats in the ​southeastern ​city of Galati ‌causing ⁠a fire to break ​out, ​the ⁠Romanian defence ​ministry ​said ⁠in a statement ⁠on ​Friday.

headlines.title: US imposes fresh sanctions on Iran's military oil sales, Treasury says
headlines.summary: The U.S. said on Thursday it has imposed new sanctions on Iran's ​military oil trade, even as Washington and Tehran reached a ‌tentative agreement to extend their ceasefire and lift restrictions on shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Claude Opus 4.8
hackerNews.summary: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

hackerNews.title: Bricks and Minifigs Stole a Man's $200k Lego Collection
hackerNews.summary: Track, organize, and value your entire LEGO® collection for free. Browse 20,000+ sets, check prices for retired sets, manage wishlists, and track minifigures.

hackerNews.title: Cars are trying to spy on you, and it's only just the beginning
hackerNews.summary: From your weight and facial expressions to your destination, cars collect a startling amount of data about you. Some of it may even raise your insurance costs.

hackerNews.title: I made a million dollar product from my dorm room (2025)
hackerNews.summary: The story of the nice!nano; a wireless Pro Micro-compatible microcontroller board I made in my freshman year of college.

hackerNews.title: Where are the economies of scale in homebuilding?
hackerNews.summary: Over the last few months we’ve examined the extent of the construction industry’s productivity problem.

hackerNews.title: Blue Origin's New Glenn blows up during static fire test
hackerNews.summary: Official Account of NSF. News, videos, and community for spaceflight enthusiasts since 2005.\n\nNSF is not affiliated with NASA, initials used with permission.

hackerNews.title: Nitpicking the shell history scene in 'Tron: Legacy'
hackerNews.summary: In the 2010 film Tron: Legacy , there's a scene where the main character Sam Flynn sits down at a computer in his father’s study, and types some commands to try to figure out what Flynn senior had last been working on, before mysteriously disappearing.

hackerNews.title: Garnix (A Nix CI) is shutting down
hackerNews.summary: I couldn’t find anything from so quoting an email I received from contact@garnix.io: garnix is shutting down Hi everyone, We wanted to let you know that garnix is joining forces with Shopify. We are sad to announce that, as part of this transition, the hosted garnix service will shut down on July 15th 2026. But we are open sourcing the garnix codebase, available here; we hope this will help you smoothly move to using your own instance or a shared one. If you are interested in ope...

hackerNews.title: I hated writing until I learned there’s a science to it (2024)
hackerNews.summary: science.org: I hated writing until I learned there’s a science to it (2024).

hackerNews.title: Show HN: Continue? Y/N: A 60-second game about AI agent permission fatigue
hackerNews.summary: A 30-second game about LLM permission fatigue. How carefully do you really read AI commands?
